title: Silicone Cooking Spoon 27cm (10.63") Heat Resistant - Non Stick Kitchen Utensil for Baking, Stirring & Mixing | Dishwasher Safe, 1-Pack Black
features: Premium Food-Grade Silicone:Crafted with 100% food-grade certified silicone, heat-resistant up to 250°C (480°F). Non-toxic & odourless with BPA-free guarantee, safely withstands frying/sautéing while protecting non-stick cookware coatings.

Ergonomic Professional Design:Extended 10.63" length prevents hand burns when stirring deep pots. Streamlined handle with anti-slip grooves and hanging hole for space-saving storage - ideal for compact UK kitchens.

Scratch-Proof & Dishwasher Safe:Seamless moulding eliminates bacteria traps. Glossy surface repels oils/stains - cleans effortlessly with soapy water or top-rack dishwasher cycles (IP65-certified OPP bag included for hygiene protection).

Multi-Purpose Cooking Tool:Perfect for caramelizing sugars, folding batter, or serving stews. Works with induction hobs, ceramic pans, and glass bakeware. Commercial-grade durability for home kitchens & culinary classrooms.
Sustainable Kitchen Essential:REACH-compliant silicone retains flexibility from -40°C to 250°C. Carbon-neutral packaging with recycled OPP film. 1-year warranty against melting/warping.
